prompt: A production-ready rigged 3D model of a hawk moth. Use recursive part-based decomposition to ensure the wings are separate meshes from the body (thorax). The 6 legs should also be separate articulable parts. Steampunk aesthetic with brass and gear details on the thorax and wings. Large clock-face wings. The model must have separate GameObjects for the wings in the prefab hierarchy. Facing +Z. high detail. clean geometry. production ready. material included. final prefab saved to Assets/_InsectWars/Units/Hawk Moth/HawkMoth_Editable.prefab.
